titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the New Music USA Collection
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Jonathan Manton

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday March 19, 2020 at 00:00

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Interviews conducted for NewMusicBox, the online magazine for New Music USA.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research. Streaming access to recordings in this collection is available when connected to the Yale network, or otherwise by request.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Rights and permissions for Oral History of American Music materials vary between individual interviews. Researchers wishing to publish or broadcast Oral History of American Music materials are responsible for obtaining direct authorization from copyright holders: generally, the interviewees or their estates.
For this collection, rights for each interview are jointly owned by New Music USA and the interviewee in each instance.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: NMUSA, New Music USA Collection, Oral History of American Music, in the Music Library of Yale University.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is arranged alphabetically by surname of interviewee.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes both audio (.ogg) and video (.mp4) copies of the interview. Date is based on interview date, not date of digital files.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes both audio (.ogg) and video (.mp4) copies of the interview. Date is based on interview date, not date of digital files.

scopecontent.p: Includes both audio (.ogg) and video (.mp4) copies of the interview. Date is based on interview date, not date of digital files.

scopecontent.p: Includes both audio (.wav) and video (.mov) copies of the interview. Date is based on interview date, not date of digital files.

scopecontent.p: Video (.mov) files. Date is based on interview date, not date of digital files.

scopecontent.p: Includes both audio (.ogg) and video (.mp4) copies of the interview. Date is based on interview date, not date of digital files.

did.unittitle: Jones, Bill T. and Daniel Bernard Roumain (DBR)
Jones, Bill T. and Daniel Bernard Roumain (DBR)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes both audio (.ogg) and video (.mp4) copies of the interview. Date is based on interview date, not date of digital files.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Allison, Ben; Blake, Michael; Horton, Ron; Kimbrough, Frank; Nash, Ted.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Video (.mp4) file. Date is based on interview date, not date of digital files.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Outside container label indicates this is "Part 2" of an interview.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Label on container indicates this is an interview with Marin Alsop. However, the label on the Mini DV tape itself, indicates this is an interview with Jerod Tate, as well as some rehearsal footage.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes both audio (.ogg) and video (.mp4) copies of the interview. Date is based on interview date, not date of digital files. The description of this interview on NewMusicBox's website states that this interview was conducted on "Sunday, May 8th at the Issue Project Room."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes both audio (.ogg) and video (.mp4) copies of the interview. Date is based on interview date, not date of digital files. Digital file titles suggest this interview was on May 10th, 2005. However, the description of this interview on NewMusicBox's website states that this interview was conducted on "Wednesday, May 11th at the Whitney Altria across the street from Grand Central Station."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pre concert talk

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Dante Trilogy. Miller Theatre.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Tape 3.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Dinner
